overview.title: Plant Overview
overview.desc: Entrance gate, aerial views, site layout — Singrauli Super Thermal Power Station.

chimney_fgd.title: Chimney & Flue Gas / FGD
chimney_fgd.desc: Stacks, ESP hoppers, flue-gas ducting, FGD absorber, limestone MCC.

boiler.title: Boiler Island
boiler.desc: Furnace structure, boiler house, draught fans, mills, firing system.

coal.title: Coal Handling
coal.desc: Coal yard, conveyors, bunkers, mills, wagon tippler area.

turbine.title: Turbine & Generator
turbine.desc: Turbine hall, HP/IP/LP cylinders, generator stator, lube oil.

condenser.title: Condenser & Heat Rejection
condenser.desc: Condenser, vacuum system, LP exhaust, heat exchangers.

pumphouse.title: CW Pump House
pumphouse.desc: Circulating water pumps, intake sump, Rihand reservoir draw.

feedwater.title: Feed-water & BFP
feedwater.desc: Boiler feed pumps, heaters, deaerator, condensate extraction.

dm_water.title: DM Water Plant
dm_water.desc: Demineralisation — ion exchange, storage, make-up water.

hydrogen.title: Hydrogen Plant
hydrogen.desc: Electrolysers, H₂ storage, generator cooling gas system.

chlorination.title: Chlorination Plant
chlorination.desc: Electrochlorinators, NaOCl dosing for cooling water.

electrical.title: Electrical & Switchyard
electrical.desc: 400 kV switchyard, transformers, MCC, motor control centres.

control.title: Control & Instrumentation
control.desc: DCS panels, transmitters, control room, process notes.

auxiliary.title: Auxiliary Systems
auxiliary.desc: Compressed air, fuel oil, pumps, pipe racks, workshops.
